Constitution.description: General health, stamina, resistance to disease, and the ability to absorb damage

Self Discipline.description: Willpower, concentration, determination, and the control of mind over body

Memory.description: The ability to retain, recall, and detail facts

Strength.description: Power, force, and the ability to use muscles to their greatest advantage

Quickness.description: Speed, reflexes, dodging ability, and conscious reaction time

Presence.description: Charisma, self-esteem, morale, and the ability to influence or control others

Intuition.description: Luck, wisdom, insight, and precognitive or psychic abilities

Empathy.description: Emotional capacity, magical prowess, and the character's relationship to natural and supernatural forces

primary_skills.description: Reduces the physical maneuver penalties associated with wearing cumbersome armor. Skill must be developed separately for each specific armor category (Soft Leather, Rigid Leather, Chain, and Plate)
Reduces the physical maneuver penalties associated with wearing cumbersome armor. Skill must be developed separately for each specific armor category (Soft Leather, Rigid Leather, Chain, and Plate)
Reduces the physical maneuver penalties associated with wearing cumbersome armor. Skill must be developed separately for each specific armor category (Soft Leather, Rigid Leather, Chain, and Plate)
Reduces the physical maneuver penalties associated with wearing cumbersome armor. Skill must be developed separately for each specific armor category (Soft Leather, Rigid Leather, Chain, and Plate)
Determines a character's offensive bonus and overall effectiveness when attacking with one-handed slashing weapons like scimitars or short swords.
Determines a character's offensive bonus and overall effectiveness when attacking with one-handed concussion weapons like maces or war hammers.
Determines a character's offensive bonus and overall effectiveness when attacking with heavy two-handed weapons like two-handed swords or war mattocks.
Determines a character's offensive bonus and overall effectiveness when attacking with pole-mounted weapons like spears or halberds.
Determines a character's offensive bonus and overall effectiveness when attacking with missile weapons like short bows or slings.
Determines a character's offensive bonus and overall effectiveness when attacking with thrown weapons like throwing knives or axes.
The ability to ascend and descend surfaces, ranging from ladders to sheer mountain faces, as well as rappelling and moving along ropes
The ability to successfully identify and disarm inanimate traps
Dictates how much information and how many clues a character gathers through observation, allowing them to notice hidden objects, traps, or ambushes
The ability to lock, unlock, or bypass locks and similar mechanisms
The ability to stay mounted, retain control when an animal is startled or hostile, and gain control over unfamiliar mounts
The ability to move silently and conceal one's presence using shadows and camouflage, both while moving and while remaining stationary
The ability to stay afloat, swim distances, make headway against currents, and prevent drowning
The skill of transmitting and receiving raw magical power (power points) between two willing individuals over a distance
Functions like a weapon skill for spells directed at a single target (such as elemental bolts), adding to the caster's offensive attack roll with that specific spell
Determines the percentile chance a character has of successfully learning a new spell list during their development
Enables a character to successfully decipher and cast spells that have been inscribed as runes into suitable media
Enables a character to understand and cast spells from a staff, wand, or other item that possesses built-in spell-casting abilities
The ability to dodge or deflect melee and missile attacks while unarmored and unencumbered, adding the skill bonus directly to the character's Defensive Bonus
The art of superhuman effort, utilizing preparation and concentration to perform exceptional, momentary feats of balance, leaping, landing, speed, strength, or quick-drawing a weapon
The ability to make a highly precise attack against an undetected foe, allowing the attacker to favorably adjust the resulting critical strike roll for a deadlier blow
Determines the character's base hit point total, dictating exactly how much damage (concussion hits) they can absorb before passing out
The ability to understand, speak, and write different languages
Unarmed combat techniques focused on delivering strikes, sweeps, and grappling maneuvers

secondary_skills.description: Bonus for in-air maneuvers (e.g., flying or levitation) or swinging on objects [1]. Helps reduce the effects of falls [1].
Bonus for impersonating others, devising new identities, etc [1].

Bonus for administering medical aid to injured animals [1]. Allows one to stabilize or repair light wounds and illnesses [1]. Successful static maneuver can stop (or reduce) up to 5 hits/round bleeding [1].
Bonus chance of determining natural course and lay of a cave or cavern (passage or chamber) [1]. Bonus when attempting an unassisted maneuver in a cave [1].
Bonus for manipulating one's body in order to move through small openings or absorb sudden crushing impact (other than falls) [2]. Helps escape from bonds, etc [2].
Bonus when detecting bad food, or preparing/neutralizing dangerous herbs and food ingredients [2]. Includes poison preparations as well as normal cooking [2].
Bonus when attempting to recreate a dance one witnesses [3]. Also used to create new dances, this skill can be a factor in Magic Rituals [3].
Bonus for controlled falling maneuvers [4].

Bonus for creation of false but believable writings or illustrations or records from scratch [5]. It is used to falsify bank records and accounts, change testimony records to misrepresent the facts, etc [5].
Bonus for applications of emergency aid or treatment (limited to type of creature), such as attempts to halt or slow bleeding or damaging deterioration [6].
Bonus for making an arrow out of available wood, metal, paper, and/or feathers [7]. Note: With this skill, sophisticated types of special purpose arrows may be crafted [7].
Bonus chance of finding any local source of potable water or edible plants and animals [8]. Includes basic food acquisition such as gathering or fishing [8].

Bonus to attempt to go into a state of single-minded, unpredictable rage which results in an additional +30 to the OB, the ability to take twice normal concussion damage and the ability to deliver double the concussion hit damage [7].
Bonus when playing any game with a significant element of luck [9]. Also includes cheating as a form of improving one's luck at any game [9].
Bonus for gathering, befriending, or manipulating herd animals [10]. Skill normally deals with one group of animals at a time [10].
Bonus for working with hides and creating leather goods (e.g., leather armor, bolas, etc) [11].
Bonus for calculating distances, angles, and applying basic principles of physics to a given situation [12].
Bonus for entering, leaving, and exploiting meditative trances [13].
Bonus for writing music language which other musicians can understand and use [14].
Bonus for determining proper directions and distances when using a map in conjunction with various directional aids, such as a compass, a landmark, or the stars [14].
Bonus for impressing, entertaining, or manipulating of groups of people directly [15].
Bonus proficiency in knot recognition, knot-tying, braiding, and splicing, or when making a maneuver while suspended from a rope or analogous flexible line, or when throwing a line [16].
Bonus for self-powered boat maneuvers, including rowing, poling, etc [16].
Bonus for sailing maneuvers [17].
Bonus when attempting to emotionally, sensually, or sexually manipulate someone [18].
Bonus when using any form of signal communications [19].
Bonus for attempts to mimic tunes and vocalized notes [20].
Bonus for skiing maneuvers [21].
Bonus for working with normal metals to create or repair desired objects (e.g., horse shoes, metal ornaments) [21]. Bonus for oven or kiln building, and doubling effects of fires [21].
Description not provided in excerpts.
Bonus chance of determining dates, directions, and locations when the stars are visible [22]. Provides an ideal complement to one's navigation skill [22].
Bonus for working with stone and creating sculptures, writings, or any other form of inscription or relief [22].
Bonus for attempts to immobilize (render unconscious) a foe by applying a sharp, hand-delivered blow to a precise point on the victim's upper body [22].
Bonus for visual tracking and following of a trail left by someone or something [23].
Bonus for transactions involving a bargained exchange of money or goods, particularly with respect to rolls on purchase or resale price charts [24].
Allows building traps out of available resources [25].
Bonus for any maneuvers involving slight of hand; confusing sight tricks and slight-of-hand diversions [25].
Bonus for horizontal dives, rolling, or vaulting maneuvers, or swinging on stationary objects [17].
Bonus chance of determining local weather for next 24 hours [17].
Bonus for fashioning any object out of the required amount of wood, bone, or similar material [17].
